Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Per-job CC ratings, records, badges, and an opt-in ladder.
Description: Tracks Casual and Ranked CC ratings per job, lifetime records, role streak badges, and an optional community leaderboard. Use /cjr.
Changelog: Connects the optional community leaderboard to its live hosted API. Temporary upload failures now retry from a bounded local FIFO, while D1 safeguards cap costly replays and registration abuse. Existing custom servers, credentials, and sharing choices remain preserved; registration and future sharing are separate opt-ins.
